The '''''Anxarta''-class Freighter''' was one of the few transports produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] which were available to the public. The last models of this type were produced before the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], approximately [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], when Sienar Fleet Systems concentrated their efforts on the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] market, which was more profitable for them than selling light freighters. One of the last units produced was ''[[The Agent]]'', used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Scandium Team]] and [[Gale Team]].
